name: Olivier
guideTitle: US College Soccer & Exercise Science Guide

paths.label: Path A — Aim High D1
paths.title: Top D1 Target
paths.body: Target: UCLA, USF, UCSB, Virginia, SMU, FIU, UNC, FAU. Requires elite highlights and improving academic standing. Best if Olivier's videos demonstrate high-level ability against quality opposition. FAU is the most accessible warm-climate D1 with the best explicit Pre-PT degree in the guide.
paths.footer: GPA minimum: 2.3 NCAA core. Aim 3.0+ for merit aid stacking.

paths.label: Path A2 — ACC Elite
paths.title: Reach ACC Programs
paths.body: Target: Clemson, Notre Dame, Maryland, Georgetown, UNC. Nation-leading MLS pipeline. Noonan (Clemson, 2× NCAA champion), Riley (Notre Dame), Cirovski (Maryland), Wiese (Georgetown). Requires top-level highlight reel, GPA 2.8+ and a standout athletic profile. These programs recruit internationally — Platform Sports Management connections are essential to get in front of coaches.
paths.footer: High competition for roster spots. Best-case scenario if Olivier's form peaks in 2026.

paths.label: Path B — Smart Fit D2
paths.title: D2 / NAIA Best Match
paths.body: Target: PBA (West Palm Beach), Lynn (Boca Raton), Barry (Miami), Nova Southeastern (Fort Lauderdale), St Edward's (Austin). Best overall balance of soccer, academics, scholarship, and climate. PBA is #2 nationally 2025 with Pre-PT in the degree title. Lynn won the 2024 D2 national championship.
paths.footer: Athletic + academic aid can combine for major cost reduction.

paths.label: Path C — Ivy League
paths.title: Princeton / Yale
paths.body: No athletic scholarships — need-based aid only (can cover 100% of costs for qualifying families). GPA 2.8 is a barrier but improving trajectory helps. Princeton won the 2024 AND 2025 Ivy tournaments — program is surging. Jim Barlow has explicitly developed midfielders into MLS-calibre players. Elite academic-sports combination.
paths.footer: ⚠ Admission is highly selective — GPA improvement to 3.5+ essential.

paths.label: Path D — JUCO Transfer
paths.title: 2yr + Transfer
paths.body: Santa Monica College (LA) → UCLA/UCSB. Or Iowa Western (Council Bluffs) → Creighton/Iowa/D1 Midwest. 2 years at ~$9k/yr. Boost GPA, build US soccer resume. SMC is 100m from the beach — most proven transfer pipeline in California. Iowa Western has 100% MF roster turnover before 2027 — immediate starting opportunity.
paths.footer: Near-zero financial risk. Build to 3.3+ GPA then step up.

coachQuestions: How many central midfielders are returning and where does an 8/10 fit into your system in year one?
What formation do you play and what is the role of the 8 in your system specifically?
What does a typical scholarship package look like for an Australian student-athlete?
Is there a direct articulation agreement with a DPT program for Exercise Science graduates?
How many players from this program have signed professional contracts in the last 5 years?
Can I visit campus during a training session and speak with current international students?
Does the Exercise Science department work directly with the soccer team for sport science support?
How are WES-evaluated Australian unit credits typically applied toward the degree?
